evalAfter: (async () => { const r={}; const btn=[...document.querySelectorAll('button,a')].find(el=>/Entrar a MOS/i.test(el.textContent||'')); if(btn)btn.click(); await new Promise(res=>setTimeout(res,3000)); r.version=(await fetch('version.json?b='+Date.now()).then(x=>x.json()).catch(()=>({}))).version; try{MOS.nav('catalogo');}catch(e){} await new Promise(res=>setTimeout(res,4500)); const inp=document.getElementById('searchCatalogo'); if(inp){inp.value='ajonjoli granel';MOS.filterCatalogo();} await new Promise(res=>setTimeout(res,1500)); window.scrollTo(0,0); const tg=document.querySelector('.cat-card .toggle-sw.on'); r.toggleBg=tg?getComputedStyle(tg).backgroundImage.slice(0,45):null; const env=document.querySelector('.cat-card .badge-yellow'); r.envColor=env?getComputedStyle(env).color:null; const price=document.querySelector('.cat-card .cat-price'); r.priceColor=price?getComputedStyle(price).color:null; return r; })()
